name: elastic-security
label: Elastic Security
description: Elastic Security provides threat prevention, detection, and response capabilities built on the Elastic Stack. It unifies SIEM, endpoint security, and cloud security in a single solution.

fields.title: Server URL
fields.description: Specify the server URL of the Elastic server to connect and perform automated operations.
fields.name: url
fields.tooltip: Specify the server URL of the Elastic server to connect and perform automated operations.

fields.title: API Key
fields.description: Specify the API Key to connect to the endpoint and perform automated operations
fields.name: api_key
fields.tooltip: Specify the API Key to connect to the endpoint and perform automated operations

fields.title: Verify SSL
fields.description: Specifies whether the SSL certificate for the server is to be verified. By default, this option is selected, i.e., set to true.
fields.name: verify_ssl
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the SSL certificate for the server is to be verified. By default, this option is selected, i.e., set to true.

operations.title: Get Cluster Health Status
operations.description: Retrieve the cluster health status based on the index parameter that you have specified.

parameters.title: Index
parameters.description: Specify the index to retrieve all data streams and indices in a cluster. Possible values are _all or *
parameters.name: index
parameters.tooltip: Specify the index to retrieve all data streams and indices in a cluster. Possible values are _all or *

operations.title: Get EQL Search Results
operations.description: Retrieve a search results for an Event Query Language (EQL) query based on the index and query parameters you have specified.

parameters.title: Index
parameters.description: Specify the index to search results for an Event Query Language (EQL) query from Elastic. Possible values are _all or *
parameters.name: index
parameters.tooltip: Specify the index to search results for an Event Query Language (EQL) query from Elastic. Possible values are _all or *

parameters.title: Query
parameters.description: Specify the EQL query to search results from Elastic.
parameters.name: query
parameters.tooltip: Specify the EQL query to search results from Elastic.

operations.title: Run an ES|QL Query
operations.description: Retrieve a search results for an ES|QL (Elasticsearch query language) query from Elastic based on the query and other input parameters you have specified.

parameters.title: Query
parameters.description: Specify the ES|QL query to search results from Elastic.
parameters.name: query
parameters.tooltip: Specify the ES|QL query to search results from Elastic.

parameters.title: Format
parameters.description: Select the format by which to search results. You can choose from the following options: CSV, JSON, TSV, TXT, YAML, CBOR, Smile, or Arrow.
parameters.name: format
parameters.tooltip: Select the format by which to search results. You can choose from the following options: CSV, JSON, TSV, TXT, YAML, CBOR, Smile, or Arrow.

parameters.title: Delimiter
parameters.description: Specify the delimiter to use between values within a CSV row. Note: Only valid for the CSV format.
parameters.name: delimiter
parameters.tooltip: Specify the delimiter to use between values within a CSV row. Note: Only valid for the CSV format.

parameters.title: Remove Empty Columns
parameters.description: If enabled, columns that contain only null values are excluded from the results. By default, this is false. When true, the response also includes an all_columns section listing every column name.
parameters.name: drop_null_columns
parameters.tooltip: If enabled, columns that contain only null values are excluded from the results. By default, this is false. When true, the response also includes an all_columns section listing every column name.

parameters.title: Allow Partial Results
parameters.description: If true, partial results will be returned if there are shard failures, but the query can continue to execute on other clusters and shards. If false, the query will fail if there are any failures. By default, this is false.
parameters.name: allow_partial_results
parameters.tooltip: If true, partial results will be returned if there are shard failures, but the query can continue to execute on other clusters and shards. If false, the query will fail if there are any failures. By default, this is false.

operations.title: Execute an API Request
operations.description: Sends an API request to an API endpoint based on specified HTTP method, endpoint, and other input parameters that you have specified, enabling flexible API interactions tailored to user needs.

parameters.title: HTTP Method
parameters.description:
Select an HTTP action for the request. You can select from the following options: 

GET 

PUT 

POST 

DELETE 

PATCH 

HEAD 

OPTIONS 

TRACE
parameters.name: method

parameters.title: Endpoint
parameters.description: Specify the target API URL path for the request. For example, if the website is https://example.com and URL path is https://example.com/images/pic.jpg, the endpoint would be /images/pic.jpg.
parameters.name: api_endpoint
parameters.tooltip: Specify the target API URL path for example: /_cluster/health/_all

parameters.title: Query Parameters
parameters.description: (Optional) Specify any optional parameters to add to the URL and refine the request.
parameters.name: params
parameters.tooltip: (Optional) Specify any optional parameters to add to the URL and refine the request.

parameters.title: Request Payload
parameters.description: (Optional) Specify data, as JSON, to be sent as the request payload (typically for POST or PUT requests).
parameters.name: json_data
parameters.tooltip: (Optional) Specify data, as JSON, to be sent as the request payload (typically for POST or PUT requests).

operations.title: (Deprecation Warning) Get Status
operations.description: Retrieve the health status from Elastic Security
